overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a red flying car with yellow thrusters navigating through a futuristic cyberpunk city. The vehicle weaves between glass skyscrapers, flies over waterways, and maneuvers through dense urban canyons with vibrant billboards and elevated highways.

segments.scene_description: The sequence begins with a red flying car accelerating through a futuristic commercial district. The vehicle passes under a large SEOCHO sign and flies past vibrant billboards including a prominent pink DREAM sign. Below, sparse traffic moves along the multi-lane streets.

segments.scene_description: The flying car ascends through a canyon of modern glass office towers, the sunlight filtering between the buildings. The vehicle gains altitude as it moves away from the commercial strip toward an open waterfront area visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle banks left over a wide urban waterway, revealing construction cranes and dock structures along the shore. The flying car turns toward the dense downtown core, where a building with a prominent 70 sign comes into view.

segments.scene_description: The flying car enters the densest part of the city, navigating between skyscrapers covered in holographic billboards. White steam vents from industrial rooftop equipment partially obscure the view as the vehicle begins a rapid descent through the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban canyon between high-rise buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a tight urban canyon, flying close to building facades with limited sky visibility. The camera weaves through narrow gaps between concrete structures, passing near a multi-level parking structure before emerging toward a more open plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop parking and vertical transport corridor

events.description: rapid ascent up building facade toward upper city levels
reaching upper city levels with highway overpasses visible in distance

segments.scene_description: The flying car emerges from the narrow canyon and begins a rapid vertical ascent up a skyscraper facade. Highway overpasses become visible in the distance as the vehicle climbs toward the upper levels of the city, with mountains visible on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a red flying car as it accelerates from a vibrant commercial district into a soaring ascent over a modern urban waterfront. It begins by weaving through a commercial strip, passing under a large SEOCHO sign and gliding past a prominent pink DREAM billboard above multi-lane streets. As the vehicle gains altitude, the scene shifts into a canyon of glass office towers where sunlight filters between the skyscrapers. The camera then follows the car as it banks left over a wide urban waterway, revealing construction cranes and dock structures along the shore. Finally, the trajectory turns back toward the dense downtown core, bringing a building with a prominent 70 sign into view.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that plunges from a dense, holographic urban core into a narrow concrete canyon before soaring upward toward a wide city horizon. It begins with the flying car diving through a cluster of skyscrapers draped in holographic billboards, where white steam from rooftop vents partially obscures the descent. As the vehicle enters a tight urban canyon, the view narrows to the gray facades of concrete structures and multi-level parking garages, weaving through restrictive gaps with limited visibility of the sky. The scene then opens as the car emerges into a plaza area and immediately shifts into a rapid vertical ascent up a skyscraper facade. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal distant highway overpasses and mountains on the horizon as the vehicle climbs toward the upper levels of the city.
